title: claim
description: A per-node claim/lease file (contracts/<node-id>.claim), created O_CREAT|O_EXCL to make ready->running single-flight at the NODE grain. A worker must acquire the claim before executing a node; it renews the lease via heartbeat. On resume: an unexpired lease means the node is live (skip it); an expired lease means the previous owner crashed (reconcile via the event log); a claim with delegated_to set means the node is delegated to a live child loop (await its closeout, never re-dispatch).

owner_id.description: Stable id of the worker/session/agent holding the claim.

acquired_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp the claim was first acquired.

lease_expires_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp after which the lease is stale and the node may be reclaimed.

phase.description: The loop phase (continue_as_new counter) at claim time.

heartbeat_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the most recent heartbeat that renewed the lease.

delegated_to.description: If set, the child loop id (L<seq>[.<seq>]) this node is delegated to; the node stays running until that child loop's closeout returns. Never re-dispatch a delegated node.
